examples: Methods The operation was performed with perforation or plate keratoplasty.
Objective to discuss the curative effect of keratoplasty to treat keratopathy.
Conclusion The keratoplasty might be an effective method to treat keratopathy.
This surgical procedure, also known as keratoplasty, replaces damaged cornea tissue with healthy tissue from a donor.
This is sometimes referred to as endothelial keratoplasty or posterior lamellar endothelial keratoplasty.
